x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The Dafny CLI enables working with Dafny, a verification-aware programming language. Use 'dafny -?' to see help for the previous CLI format.

commands.name: resolve
commands.description: Only check for parse and type resolution errors.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify the program.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: build
commands.description: Produce an executable binary or a library.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run the program.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input file or Dafny project file

arguments.name: program-arguments
arguments.description: arguments to the Dafny program [default: System.Collections.Generic.List`1[System.String]]

commands.name: translate
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to source and build files in a specified language.

commands.name: cs
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to C# source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: js
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to JavaScript source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: go
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to Go source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: java
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to Java source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: py
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to Python source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: cpp
commands.description:
Translate Dafny sources to C++ source and build files.

This back-end has various limitations (see Docs/Compilation/Cpp.md).
This includes lack of support for BigIntegers (aka int), most higher order functions,
and advanced features like traits or co-inductive types.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: lib
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to Dafny Library (.doo) source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: rs
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to Rust source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: dfy
commands.description: Translate Dafny sources to ResolvedDesugaredExecutableDafny source and build files.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: format
commands.description:
Format the dafny file in-place.
If no dafny file is provided, will look for every available Dafny file.
Use '--print' to output the content of the formatted files instead of overwriting them.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: doc
commands.description: [Experimental] Create a description page for each module. Files are placed in the folder specified by --output (default is ./docs).

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: measure-complexity
commands.description: (Experimental) Measure the complexity of verifying the program.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: server
commands.description: Start the Dafny language server

commands.name: test
commands.description: (Experimental) Execute every method in the program that's annotated with the {:test} attribute.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: generate-tests
commands.description: (Experimental) Generate Dafny tests that ensure block or path coverage of a particular Dafny program.

arguments.name: mode
arguments.description:
Block - Generate tests targeting block-coverage.
InlinedBlock - Generate tests targeting block coverage after inlining (call-graph sensitive block coverage).
Path - Generate tests targeting path-coverage.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: find-dead-code
commands.description: (Experimental) Use counterexample generation to warn about potential dead code.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Report issues in the Dafny code that might limit the soundness claims of verification, emitting them as warnings or in a report document.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file

commands.name: merge-coverage-reports
commands.description: Merge several previously generated coverage reports together.

arguments.name: outDir
arguments.description: directory in which to save the combined coverage report

arguments.name: reports
arguments.description: directories with coverage reports to be merged [default: System.Collections.Generic.List`1[System.IO.FileInfo]]

commands.name: documentation
commands.description: Generates some Dafny documentation files for errors based on a template

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Can be used to generate DafnyPrelude.bpl. Uses the ':extract_boogie_name' attribute to rename symbols. Turns lemmas into universally quantified axioms, as opposed to verify which turns them into Boogie procedures. When translating Dafny expressions to Boogie ones, no well-formedness checks are created.

arguments.name: The name of the module to be extracted.
The path of the extracted file.
file
arguments.description: Dafny input files and/or a Dafny project file
